messages.content:
What type of platform is Twitter?


Commerce platform


Development platform


Enterprise platform


Social platform
Social platform

Which describes the "Network Effect?"


A platform becomes more useful as its total computing power increases.


A platform becomes more useful as more people join and use it.


A platform becomes more useful as it is linked to more applications.


A platform can lose effectiveness if too many users are logged in simultaneously.
A platform becomes more useful as more people join and use it.

A new Accenture client is looking for a platform that will help them in hiring for critical roles and decreasing attrition. Which Accenture tool will help the client select the best type of platform for overcoming these challenges?


myIndustry


DevOps


SynOps


myConcerto
myConcerto.

What differentiates Accenture’s Intelligent Platform Services (IPS) when our clients are making a decision to partner with a services company?


an ability to create custom standalone applications and software specific to the business


an ability to use pre-packaged software solutions from platform partners right out of the box


an ability to integrate deep technical knowledge, functional context, and industry experience


an ability to automate the product lifecycle for improved time to market and customer experience
an ability to integrate deep technical knowledge, functional context, and industry experience.

What is an example of new technology having a positive impact on sustainability?


setting up a separate data center in each of a company's regional offices


predicting a customer's future purchases using artificial intelligence


mining cryptocurrency using a series of linked computer servers


using smart meters to track energy consumption in homes
using smart meters to track energy consumption in homes.

How can edge computing be used to improve sustainability?


by instantly converting older machines to use renewable energy


by requiring all devices to connect directly to government servers


by allowing devices to operate without a network connection


by using sensors to track real-time data about energy usage
by using sensors to track real-time data about energy usage.

A major healthcare company has reduced its data center carbon footprint by more than 80%.

What action has likely contributed to this the most?


offering incentives for employees to bike or walk to work


shifting from on-site data centers to the public cloud


building individual data centers at each client site


adding electric-powered cars and trucks to its fleet
shifting from on-site data centers to the public cloud.

What is one of the main sustainability benefits of using large-scale, cloud computing data centers?


They expand the ways to use smart monitoring for tracking waste management.


They provide a cost- and energy-effective way to manage computation resources.


They improve overall management of production and marketing operations.


They provide a streamlined approach to the collection of massive amounts of data.
They provide a cost- and energy-effective way to manage computation resources.

What is a way Accenture plans to achieve its sustainability goals?


by integrating sustainability metrics into all our client engagements


by implementing the same sustainability strategy for all our clients


by rejecting all work on engagements that result in carbon emissions


by achieving net zero emissions through advanced robotics capabilities
by integrating sustainability metrics into all our client engagements.

What is a recent trend relating to sustainability worldwide?


The global temperature has stopped rising and started to decline.


Automobile companies are increasing their share of gasoline-powered cars.


Net emissions are decreasing in some highly developed countries.


The cost of renewable energy sources has increased substantially.
Net emissions are decreasing in some highly developed countries.

What is the objective of Accenture's e-stewards program?


to reduce energy consumption at Accenture client sites


to responsibly dispose of used electronic hardware


to eliminate paper usage at all Accenture offices


to convert waste products into renewable resources
to responsibly dispose of used electronic hardware.

When delivering digital technologies to clients, what is a best practice to make those solutions sustainable?


Sign non-disclosure agreements when a solution will have a negative environmental impact.


Incorporate sustainability into the design and build of the solution from the beginning.


Review the solution after building and look for ways to improve sustainability.


Recommend the client spread out their data centers to distribute energy usage globally.
Incorporate sustainability into the design and build of the solution from the beginning.

How do technologies such as virtual machines and containers help improve operational efficiency?


by allowing multiple applications to run on a single server


by eliminating the need for cloud data centers altogether


by spreading energy consumption across multiple locations


by reducing the consumer demand for cloud computing services
by allowing multiple applications to run on a single server.

hat is an example of a Scope Three carbon emission?


purchasing a manufactured item


running an electric heater


driving a gasoline-fueled vehicle


cooking on a barbecue at home
purchasing a manufactured item.

How does the Accenture myNav Green Cloud Advisor integrate sustainability when transitioning client data centers to the cloud?


by estimating carbon emission reductions and sustainability index improvements


by tracking all energy consumption at small-scale data centers in specified locations


by recommending virtual collaboration tools to reduce overall business travel


by tracking supply chain data to confirm that suppliers are using sustainable processes
by estimating carbon emission reductions and sustainability index improvements.

What does Accenture mean by "Sustainability will be the new digital?"


Digital platforms will be phased out in favor of more traditional business solutions.


Accenture will need to replace all of its current technologies to be truly compliant.


Sustainability will be a part of all of our work and drive new value and growth for our clients.


Sustainability will help all areas within Accenture to create and implement new regulations.
Sustainability will be a part of all of our work and drive new value and growth for our clients.

Accenture secures a contract with a new client that has implemented very little automation across the organization and is unfamiliar with automation concepts in general. The client would like to start mapping out an automation journey at a high level, and develop plans for implementing it.

Which Accenture platform would best help the client in this scenario?


myBuddy


myWizard


mySolutionPlanner


myCredential
mySolutionPlanner.

ow does Robotic Process Automation (RPA) differ from Intelligent Automation (IA)?


RPA is more expensive to implement than IA.


RPA can be implemented more quickly than IA.


RPA is not compatible with existing applications, unlike IA.


RPA is more complex to design and implement than IA.
RPA can be implemented more quickly than IA.

n the context of automation, what is a robot?


a physical machine built to replicate a task that a human performs


a physical machine designed to help a human user to perform a specific task


a piece of software designed to replicate a repetitive task


a piece of software designed to assist a human user
a piece of software designed to replicate a repetitive task.

What is Robotic Process Automation (RPA)?


a technology that allows software to replicate human actions to execute business processes


a protocol that allows software to replicate human-to-human communications


an area of robotics that allows software applications to process human inputs to execute a business process


a framework that develops software applications without human intervention
a technology that allows software to replicate human actions to execute business processes.

Which process would benefit from the use of Robotic Process Automation (RPA)?


generating social media content to interact with customers


editing and proofreading scientific papers to remove errors


determining timelines for key deliverables for an Agile team


gathering patient data to schedule appointments at hospitals
gathering patient data to schedule appointments at hospitals.

A regional bank implemented an automated solution to streamline their operations for receiving and processing checks. They would like to further enhance the solution to recognize signs of potential fraud and alert their security teams accordingly.

Which technology could be combined with the current solution to do this?


Mechanization


Sentiment Analysis


Machine Learning


Robotic Process Automation
Machine Learning.

How does Accenture’s myWizard assist clients in beginning their automation journey?


by connecting the client with third-party providers who will guide them through the automation process


by automatically writing bot programs to streamline the client’s common business processes


by training the client’s employees to program complex automated solutions themselves


by helping the client create, implement, and measure enterprise-wide automation strategies
by helping the client create, implement, and measure enterprise-wide automation strategies.

A museum is evaluating historical documents for authenticity, reviewing their physical condition, and categorizing them by subject before creating a backup on the Cloud.

Which part of this process could the museum automate easily, without incurring high costs or large amounts of time and effort?


creating a backup on the Cloud


evaluating documents for authenticity


defining and assigning categories by subject


reviewing the physical condition of the documents
defining and assigning categories by subject.

What is a Digital Worker?


an advanced bot capable of managing more complex, multi-faceted situations


any employee who works with computers or computerized information


an employee who can independently write code to produce automation solutions


a quickly-created bot that focuses on a common, repetitive task
an advanced bot capable of managing more complex, multi-faceted situations.

A software team is setting an automation strategy and begins by identifying business processes that could benefit from automation.

What should be the team’s next step after this?


building and testing the automated solutions


creating a Center of Excellence for automation


planning the rollout of the automated solutions


defining the processes in clear and unambiguous language
defining the processes in clear and unambiguous language.

What is the simplest form of automation?


Intelligent Automation


Mechanization


Robotics


Robotic Process Automation
Mechanization.

What is a best practice when approaching an automation effort?


acquiring new resources before starting automation work


eliminating the need for a technical support team


improving the current process before automating it


prioritizing cost reduction above all other goals
improving the current process before automating it.
